tools.name: companyManagement.createCompany
tools.description: Creates a Codat company with a commerce partner data connection.

tools.name: companyManagement.createConnection
tools.description: Create a data connection for company.

tools.name: companyManagement.listCompanies
tools.description: Retrieve a list of all companies the client has created.

tools.name: configuration.getSyncStatus
tools.description: Check the sync history and sync status for a company.

tools.name: integrations.listIntegrations
tools.description: Retrieve a list of available integrations support by datatype and state of release.

tools.name: sync.requestSync
tools.description:
Run a Commerce sync from the last successful sync up to the date provided (optional), otherwise UtcNow is used.
If there was no previously successful sync, the start date in the config is used.

tools.name: sync.requestSyncForDateRange
tools.description: Run a Commerce sync from the specified start date to the specified finish date in the request payload.

tools.name: syncFlowPreferences.getConfigTextSyncFlow
tools.description: To enable retrieval of preferences set for the text fields on Sync Flow.

tools.name: syncFlowPreferences.getSyncFlowUrl
tools.description: Get a URL for Sync Flow including a one time passcode.

tools.name: syncFlowPreferences.getVisibleAccounts
tools.description: Enable retrieval for accounts which are visible on sync flow.

tools.name: syncFlowPreferences.updateConfigTextSyncFlow
tools.description: To enable update of preferences set for the text fields on sync flow.

tools.name: syncFlowPreferences.updateVisibleAccountsSyncFlow
tools.description: To enable update of accounts visible preferences set on Sync Flow.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
